changelog: Refactor API imports and enhance task management: update paths for tasks and timers services, implement root saga for Redux, and improve MusicWidget component structure
Add new features and refactor existing code: implement Redux store structure, update API paths, and enhance type definitions
Enhance Sidebar and SupportModal components: add toast notifications for under construction features and update GitHub link
Enhance PipPortal component: pass currentRound prop and remove commented code; update Vite configuration for auto-update and improve caching strategy
